scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run run-typechecks --include-mockup
scripts.typecheck:production: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run run-typechecks
scripts.verify:codegen: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen && (git diff --exit-code -- lib/api-zod/src/generated lib/api-client-react/src/generated || (echo '\n[verify:codegen] FAIL: lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml is out of sync with generated clients. Run: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen, then commit the changes.' >&2; exit 1))
scripts.verify: pnpm run verify:codegen && pnpm run verify:catalog && pnpm run verify:catalog-callsites && pnpm run verify:recharts-shim && pnpm run verify:react-types-singleton && pnpm run verify:tsconfig-parity && pnpm run verify:render-yaml && pnpm run verify:env-secrets && pnpm run verify:db-schema-completeness && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.verify:production: pnpm run verify:codegen && pnpm run verify:catalog && pnpm run verify:catalog-callsites && pnpm run verify:recharts-shim && pnpm run verify:react-types-singleton && pnpm run verify:tsconfig-parity && pnpm run verify:render-yaml && pnpm run verify:env-secrets && pnpm run verify:db-schema-completeness && pnpm run typecheck:production && pnpm run verify:production-readiness
